title: Crafter's Vehicle Pack
description: its a Vehicle mod you can play it in survival and you can ride in it have fun!
body:
Warning: IF YOU PLAY THE 1.20.1 VERSION INSTALL GECKOLIB!!!!!!



this i a minecraft java mod



1.19.2:

its version 3 Beta 



this is a mod that adds Vehicles for fun it works with movment



you have a Vehicle workstaion to build your Vehicles with parts and has good moevments

it can be played in survival and creative



its not too fast its not too hard to make



if you want some vehicles then this is the mod for you



1.20.1:

This Is In Release

The Mod Adds Now Go Karts Too!!

It is balenced

Have Fun!!
